case_title: THE CITY TOW VS PEREZ, LYNNE

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGES OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LYNNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LYNNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, LYNNE LYNNE PEREZ IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY COUNTY FINANCIAL SERVICES AS DEFT. COUNTY FINANCIAL SERVICES IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. DISMISSAL OF COUNTY FINANCIAL SERVICES IS AT PLTF'S REQUEST. DEFT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS OFF CALENDAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
